heading: Established 2006. Still family-run.
intro: Total Electric Solutions Ltd was founded in 2006 by Ian French, who brought over 40 years of experience in office refurbishment, commercial and industrial fit-out into a business built to do one thing well: a complete electrical package for the commercial sector.
approach: We support projects from the initial building survey, through design and tendering, right through to final handover — complete with Operation & Maintenance manuals and NICEIC certification. We've maintained close relationships with leading European lighting manufacturers over the years, and even as the business has grown, we've held onto the personal, client-focused service that got us here.
values: We back experienced talent with genuine investment in the next generation. We take pride in developing the skills of our young apprentices, and recognise the need to invest in future generations of the trade.
recognitionHeading: Recognised as one of the UK's best small businesses
recognitionBody: In 2017, the Small Awards named Total Electric Solutions one of the top five Small Family Businesses in the UK — recognition for the same family-run values we still work by today.

milestones.title: Founded by Ian French
milestones.body: Ian brings 40 years of office refurbishment and commercial fit-out experience into a family business built around one complete electrical package.

milestones.title: Trusted across London & the South East
milestones.body: Fit-outs for names like Paddy Power, Capco and John Brown Media, with lasting partnerships with leading European lighting manufacturers.

milestones.title: Top 5 Small Family Business in the UK
milestones.body: The Small Awards recognise TES among the country's five best small family businesses.

milestones.title: Second generation, same values
milestones.body: Max French leads the next chapter from our Orpington and Farringdon offices — still family-run, still NICEIC-certified on every job.
